Steps: - Click '+ New Property' button on the Properties page
Expected Results:
- 'Create New Property' modal should open
 - All fields should be empty
 - 'Create Property' button should be disabled (greyed out)

Steps:
- Open the Create New Property modal
 - Click the '×' icon at the top right of the modal
Expected Results:
- Modal should close
 - User is returned to the Properties list
 - No data should be saved

Steps:
- Open the Create New Property modal
 - Fill in some fields
 - Click the 'Cancel' button
Expected Results:
- Modal should close
 - No property should be created
 - Previously entered data should be discarded

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter a valid name in 'Property Name or Identifier' (e.g. 'Sunset Apartments')
Expected Results: - Text should be accepted and displayed in the field

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Leave 'Property Name or Identifier' blank
 - Try to submit the form
Expected Results:
- Validation error should appear on the field
 - Form should not submit
 - Field should be highlighted as required

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Observe the 'Property Name or Identifier' field without clicking it
Expected Results:
- Placeholder text 'e.g., Sunset Apartments, Building A, Property ID: 12345' should be visible
 - Helper text 'Enter a unique name or identifier for this property' should appear below

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Click 'Property Address' field
 - Start typing an address (e.g. '3151 South Babcock')
Expected Results: - Address autocomplete suggestions should appear as user types

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Leave 'Property Address' blank
 - Attempt to submit
Expected Results:
- Validation error should be shown
 - Form should not submit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter a valid city name (e.g. 'Melbourne')
Expected Results: - Text should be accepted in the City field

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Leave City field blank
 - Attempt to submit
Expected Results:
- Validation error should be shown on City field
 - Form should not submit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Click the 'State' dropdown
 - Select a state (e.g. 'FL')
Expected Results:
- Selected state should appear in the dropdown
 - Dropdown should list all valid US states

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Leave State dropdown unselected
 - Attempt to submit
Expected Results:
- Validation error should be shown on State field
 - Form should not submit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter a valid ZIP code (e.g. '32901')
Expected Results: - ZIP code should be accepted

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter an invalid ZIP code (e.g. 'ABCDE' or '123')
Expected Results:
- Validation error should appear
 - System should indicate ZIP must be numeric / correct format

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Leave ZIP Code blank
 - Attempt to submit
Expected Results:
- Validation error should be shown
 - Form should not submit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Click 'Select Type' dropdown under Property Type
 - Select a type (e.g. 'Apartment Complex')
Expected Results: - Selected type should appear in the dropdown field

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Leave Property Type unselected
 - Attempt to submit
Expected Results:
- Validation error should appear on Property Type
 - Form should not submit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Click 'Select Type' dropdown
Expected Results: - Dropdown should display all available property types (e.g. Apartment Complex, Commercial, etc.)

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter a valid number in Square Footage (e.g. '25000')
Expected Results: - Number should be accepted in the field

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter letters or special characters in Square Footage (e.g. 'abc')
Expected Results: - Field should reject non-numeric input OR show a validation error

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill all required fields
 - Leave Square Footage blank
 - Submit
Expected Results: - Form should submit successfully without Square Footage

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter a valid year in 'Year Built' field (e.g. '1998')
Expected Results: - Year should be accepted

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Enter an invalid year (e.g. '99' or 'YYYY' literally or a future year like '2999')
Expected Results: - Validation error should appear indicating valid year format is required

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill all required fields
 - Leave Year Built blank
 - Submit
Expected Results: - Form should submit successfully without Year Built

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Click the Notes text area
 - Enter additional notes
Expected Results: - Notes text area should accept free-form text input

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill all required fields
 - Leave Notes blank
 - Submit
Expected Results: - Form should submit successfully (Notes is optional)

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - In the PHOTOS section, click 'Click to upload or drag and drop'
 - Select a valid PNG or JPG file under 10MB
Expected Results:
- Image should be uploaded and previewed
 - Upload confirmation should be shown

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Try to upload a file that is not PNG or JPG (e.g. a PDF or .gif)
Expected Results:
- System should reject the file
 - Error message should indicate only PNG/JPG are accepted

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Try to upload a PNG or JPG file larger than 10MB
Expected Results:
- System should reject the file
 - Error message should indicate the 10MB size limit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Drag a valid PNG/JPG file and drop it onto the photo upload area
Expected Results: - File should be accepted and uploaded successfully

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill all required fields
 - Do not upload any photos
 - Submit
Expected Results:
- Form should submit successfully
 - Map image should be used as default per the helper text

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - In the DOCUMENTS section, click 'Click to upload documents'
 - Select a valid PDF, DOC, or XLS file under 10MB
Expected Results: - Document should be uploaded successfully

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Try to upload an unsupported file type (e.g. .mp4 or .zip)
Expected Results:
- System should reject the file
 - Error should indicate only PDF, DOC, XLS are accepted

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Try to upload a document larger than 10MB
Expected Results:
- System should reject the file
 - Error message should indicate the 10MB limit

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Click the 'Category' dropdown in the DOCUMENTS section
 - Select a different category
Expected Results:
- Selected category should appear in the dropdown
 - Helper text confirms 'Selected category is saved to the file metadata'

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Observe the Category dropdown in the DOCUMENTS section without changing it
Expected Results: - Default value should be 'Other'

Description: Submit Form – All Required Fields Filled
Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill in: Property Name, Address, City, State, ZIP, Property Type
 - Click 'Create Property'
Expected Results:
- Property should be created successfully
 - Modal should close
 - New property should appear in the Properties list

Description: Submit Form – Missing One Required Field
Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill all required fields except one (e.g. leave City blank)
 - Click 'Create Property'
Expected Results:
- Form should not submit
 - The missing required field should show a validation error

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Do not fill any fields
 - Observe the 'Create Property' button
Expected Results: - 'Create Property' button should be greyed out / disabled until required fields are filled

Steps:
- Open the modal
 - Fill all required fields (Name, Address, City, State, ZIP, Property Type)
Expected Results: - 'Create Property' button should become active/clickable
